title: HOOK — Ginger barks awake the bunk-bed sisters
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, crowd, identical sibling
prompt: Wide shot, locked camera. @Ginger jumps onto the top bunk in @BedroomSisters and barks. @Sara sits up on the top bunk rubbing eyes. @Eva sits up on the bottom bunk. @Ginger: "Woof! Woof!" @Sara: "Wait — I have a plan!" @Eva: "Really-really-really?!"
